text.more: This network visualizes collaboration relationships between producers and the artists they have produced songs for. Each node represents either a producer or an artist, while edges represent production relationships, with node size reflecting the number of connections and color indicating modularity-based collaboration communities. The visualization highlights central producers who work with multiple artists and reveals clusters of artists connected through shared production networks.
text.intro: This interactive network visualization shows relationships between music producers and the artists they have worked with, where nodes represent producers or artists and edges represent production collaborations.
text.title: Producer-Artist Collaboration Network in Popular Music

legend.edgeLabel: Lines represent production relationships between producers and artists.
legend.colorLabel: Lines represent production relationships between producers and artists.
legend.nodeLabel: Each node represents a producer or artist; larger nodes indicate more collaborations.
